# kDNSServiceFlagsWakeOnResolve | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

- [ kDNSServiceFlagsWakeOnResolve ](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsWakeOnResolve)

-  kDNSServiceFlagsWakeOnResolve 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsWakeOnResolve

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceFlagsWakeOnResolve: UInt32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsWakeOnResolve#Discussion)

This flag is meaningful only in DNSServiceResolve. When set, it tries to send a magic packet to wake up the client.
